channel.title: Tech Tips on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Tips on yexca'Blog

item.title: Honkai: Star Rail Global Server Split Tunneling Rules
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Split tunneling rules for addressing connection issues from mainland China. Key Entering the game requires a UDP connection. Many proxy protocols don’t support UDP and will automatically reject it. To fix this, simply set the UDP connection IPs to direct. Here are the two IPs I captured: 1 2 3 8.209.196.179 # The second one doesn't seem to trigger a direct connection; setting the first one might be enough 47.245.63.117 …

item.title: Real-time Markdown Preview in VS Code
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction After learning how to use Markdown , I’ve found it incredibly useful (all my recent posts are written in Markdown). Since I often work with Markdown for coding or building GitHub Pages , and VS Code is my go-to editor (for watching Diana), I looked for a way to enable real-time previews. Shortcuts Inside a Markdown file (.md), click into the editor window to focus it, then press CTRL+K followed by V. Note: make sure …

item.title: Launch OBS without Steam
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction OBS launched on Steam on March 22, 2022. While it makes updates easier, having to open Steam every time you want to use it is a bit of a hassle. Steps Right-click OBS Studio in your Steam library, then select Manage > Browse local files. In File Explorer, navigate to the path bin/64bit or bin/32bit and find obs64 or obs32. You can launch OBS directly by clicking this file. You might want to pin it to your Start menu …

item.title: Windows Screenshots and Screen Recording
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Intro These methods are for general use. For specialized requirements, you’ll need to do your own research. 1. Using Built-in Windows 10/11 Tools 1) The Built-in Snipping Tool Windows 10/11 comes with a built-in app called “Snipping Tool.” You can use it in two ways. <1> Launching the App Press the Win key, open your app list, and find “Snipping Tool.”

item.title: Inserting Code with Syntax Highlighting in Microsoft Word
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Introduction (The Fluff) Sometimes you need to insert code into a Word document. Simply pasting it looks messy, and the lack of syntax highlighting makes it a pain to read. Tool 1 CodeInWord - Elegant code display/highlighting/insertion/formatting in Word Tool 2 Syntax Highlight Code In Microsoft Word Instructions It’s straightforward: paste your code, select the language, click generate, and copy the result into Word.

item.title: Issues Connecting Navicat to SQL Server
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview This article was written by Hiyoung Adding a database in Navicat after installing SQL Server: Connection Name: Use any name you like. SQL Server Configuration Manager: Open the manager and ensure that SQL Server (SQLEXPRESS) is running. Navicat cannot connect if the service is stopped. You can see your host name by double-clicking the service. Host: In Navicat’s host field, use the format: HostName\SQLEXPRESS.
